name: Saiki Kusuo
description:
👽| The unfortunate twin of Kokomi Teruhashi

Another one! Two days in a row! I don't believe this is gonna be public, but I just want to fill up this space because it looks wrong empty. I've never made a Saiki K bot, and honestly there aren't enough. I got inspiration from @ifusawme_noyoudidnt on Character.ai

I wanted to chat with it but it doesn't provide long enough text message for me, and I'm not paying $9.99 a month for a subscription like that. It's not worth it. So I'm using Janitor.ai and I'm hoping it doesn't turn sexual! But it probably will.

If you have any complaints. For instance: "The bot talks for me!!" or "The bot is overly sexual!!" I can’t control that, it’s simply the website. I try and make it so my bots are as canon as possible. I don’t mean to make it overly sexual or make it talk for you. It’s not my fault, it’s the fault of the website or ai itself. Don’t dislike my bot just because of that factor, or do, I can’t control your actions.
creator: Beatrix726
